title: Ozothamnus vagans
taxonomy: Ozothamnus vagans is classified within the family Asteraceae. This plant belongs to the genus Ozothamnus. The species Ozothamnus vagans is native to Australia. It is a shrub species that is commonly found in coastal areas and heathlands. Within the plant's classification, it is further divided into several sub-species based on its geographical distribution.

intro: Ozothamnus vagans, also known as Tasmanian everlasting, is a shrubby plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to alleviate various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties.
